title: QueryResponse
description: Response object returned by the RisingWave Events API /sql endpoint after executing a SQL query.

columns.description: Ordered list of columns in the result set.

rows.description: Result rows. Each item is an object whose keys are column names.

rowsAffected.description: Number of rows returned or affected by the query.

error.description: Error message when the query failed; property is absent on success.

Column.title: Column
Column.description: Metadata for a single column in a RisingWave query result.

name.description: Column name as defined in the schema.

type.description: SQL data type of the column (e.g. VARCHAR, BIGINT, BOOLEAN, TIMESTAMP).

isPrimaryKey.description: True when this column is part of the primary key.

isHidden.description: True when this column is a system/hidden column not returned in SELECT *.
